author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Spreading the Dharma - Women-s Order Convention 1987
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR

QUESTIONS ON SPREADING THE DHARMA
[Women's Order Convention 1987]
Contents
1 Forming teams to teach in countries where there are no FWBO Centres?
4 Spreading the Dharma in Malaysia
4 Order members demonstrating a Sangha in action
6 The FWBO approach is not just an English approach
8 Balancing direct and indirect methods of personal development
10 Buddhists and therapy i.e. psychotherapy, psychosynthesis
13 Mentally disturbed people at meditation classes, retreats etc.
15 Proper use of the term 'indirect method'
17 The arising of the Bodhicitta as the altruistic aspect of Going for Refuge
19 Are standards too high when giving lectures in the FWBO?
24 Basic dharmic principles to emphasise when giving talks
